text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, Tokai Teio spots Mejiro McQueen
still running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio has been training hard herself, and her
strength is clearly growing day by day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As such, she has a hard time believing Symboli
Rudolf's prediction that she won't be able to beat
McQueen again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To fight back against those words, Tokai Teio
asks for a scrimmage against Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But just as Symboli Rudolf had warned, the race
results in Mejiro McQueen's victory.
